_meta.source: Mage Knight base game — Goldyx skill tokens
_meta.note: Prepared for hero selection / dummy player skill decks. Action types not in the engine's supported set (influence_per_crystal_color, flight, sideways_mana_boost, draw_cards, cooperative_source_opening) are informational until fully engine-supported.

skills.name: Freezing Power
skills.effect: Siege Attack 1, or Ice Siege Attack 1.

skills.name: Potion Making
skills.effect: Once a Round, except in combat: flip this for Heal 2.

skills.name: White Crystal Craft
skills.effect: Once a Round: flip this to gain one blue crystal to your Inventory, and one white mana token.

skills.name: Green Crystal Craft
skills.effect: Once a Round: flip this to gain one blue crystal to your Inventory, and one green mana token.

skills.name: Red Crystal Craft
skills.effect: Once a Round: flip this to gain one blue crystal to your Inventory, and one red mana token.

skills.name: Glittering Fortune
skills.effect: During interaction: get Influence 1 for each different color crystal in your Inventory. This Influence cannot be used outside of interaction.

skills.name: Flight
skills.effect: Once a Round: flip this to move to an adjacent space for free, or two spaces for 2 Move points. You must end this move in a safe space. This move does not provoke rampaging enemies.

skills.name: Universal Power
skills.effect: You may add one mana to a card played sideways: it gives +3 instead of +1, or +4 if it is an Action or Spell card of the same color as that mana.

skills.name: Motivation
skills.effect: Once a Round, on any player's turn: flip this to draw two cards. If you have the least Fame (not tied), also gain a green mana token.

skills.name: Source Opening
skills.effect: Cooperative: put this Skill token in the center and reroll a mana die in the Source. Any player may return it to you, face down, to use an extra basic-color die from the Source and give you a crystal of that color.
